channel.title: Dog Expert Tech
channel.description: Technology tutorials, downloads, and guides from Dog Expert Tech.

item.title: Fixing AMD Driver Crashes
item.description: Fix AMD driver crashes with driver cleanup, VBS/Hyper-V fixes, and an automated batch script.

item.title: What Happens if You Delete Windows System32?
item.description: Learn why deleting System32 breaks Windows and why this experiment is dangerous.
item.author: dog.expert900@gmail.com (Dog Expert Tech)

item.title: Hello World!
